title: Dr. Mitesh Chandarana
metaTitle: Dr. Mitesh Chandarana - Parkinson's & Movement Disorders Specialist in Ahmedabad
metaDescription: Dr. Mitesh Chandarana is a Parkinson's disease and Movement Disorders specialist. Completed post-doctoral fellowship from SCTIMST Trivandrum.

sectionData.name: DR. MITESH CHANDARANA
sectionData.bio:
Dr. Mitesh Chandarana is a Parkinson’s disease and Movement disorders specialist. He has done his Post-doctoral fellowship (PDF) in Movement Disorders from the renowned institute, Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology (SCTIMST), Trivandrum, Kerala, which is an institute of national importance.

He is vastly expertized in managing patients with various movement disorders such as tremors, Parkinson's disease, Parkinson plus syndromes, various types of dystonia, chorea, myoclonic jerks, tics & Tourette syndrome, stereotypies, Wilson disease etc. He has ample experience in giving Botulinum Toxin injections in various dystonia (e.g. blepharospasm, Writer’s cramp, oromandibular dystonia, cervical dystonia, limb dystonia), hemifacial spasm, tremors, spasticity and migraine. He is highly experienced in planning and programming the patients of Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) (a stereotactic neurosurgical procedure done to treat Parkinson's disease, dystonia etc.). He has done his DM Neurology from V.S. hospital, Ahmedabad. He has completed his MBBS & MD (Internal Medicine) from the Asia’s largest and renowned institute, B J Medical college and Civil Hospital, Ahmedabad.

awards: • Certified by Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology (SCTIMST) for Post-doctoral fellowship in Parkinson’s disease and Movement disorders.
• He has published 10+ articles in various national and international indexed journals.
• He has won two national movement disorders quiz contest (MDSICON quiz 2018 and Indian Rare Movement Disorders Consortium 2021).
• He has delivered talks & presented cases as a faculty in many national meetings & conferences.
